\noindent We sample 400 units from the \ttblue{inventoryData} dataset with the \ttblue{select()} function. This effectively fills the \ttblue{sample} attribute in \ttblue{mySample}.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
